title: Add Metrics Guide CSS Class and Guide Button to Toolbar
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a 'Guide' button in the toolbar that launches an interactive help guide, so that I can learn how to use the metrics features.
description:
Two additions to support in-app guided help:

1. **New CSS class** `.metricsguide` applied to the magic icon for targeting by the Pendo.io guide system
2. **New 'Guide' button** added to the top toolbar, visible only on the first step of the metrics wizard alongside the existing 'Intro' video button

The Guide button has a CSS class `.analysisguide` and does not navigate to a URL — it serves as a trigger for the Pendo.io modal help guide.
acceptance_criteria: Magic icon has the `.metricsguide` CSS class applied
A 'Guide' button appears in the top toolbar on the first step of the metrics wizard
Guide button is only visible on the first step
Guide button has the `.analysisguide` CSS class for Pendo.io targeting
Guide button does not navigate to a URL
ux_changes: Added `.metricsguide` class to the magic icon and a new 'Guide' button to the first-step toolbar. Both serve as targets for the Pendo.io in-app guidance system.
implementation_notes: The Guide button has no href — it is triggered by Pendo.io which targets the `.analysisguide` CSS class to open the guide modal.
comment_summary: Developer added the class and button, asked about the button link. Reporter clarified no link is needed as Pendo.io will trigger the guide modal based on the CSS class.
